result.summary: Mapped Cerbos’s public integration surface on cerbos.dev: 2 HTTP APIs (Cerbos PDP and Synapse, both self-hosted/public by default in docs) and 2 CLIs (`cerbos`, `cerbosctl`); no Cerbos-hosted GraphQL API or MCP server was documented, and `cerbosctl` auth details were not fully exposed in the scraped docs.
